items.title: JPMorgan downgrades Kraft Heinz, says it faces limited near-term upside after breakup pause
items.description: JPMorgan's revised forecast implies a 12% downside for shares of Kraft Heinz.

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: Traders' enthusiasm over the blowout January jobs report faded away over Wednesday's session, with the Dow Industrials breaking a three-day win streak...

items.title: These funds protect against market drops. Demand is booming
items.description: Buffer ETFs could see assets quadruple over a five-year period, according to Cerulli Associates. What to know before investing.

items.title: In series of shocks, White House policy has been a headwind for some stocks in 2026
items.description: While policy is still expected to boost the market in 2026, analysts predict unlucky sectors will face a hostile White House.

items.title: This company can process uranium and rare earths. Goldman says shares should rally more than 30%
items.description: Goldman sees government support for nuclear power and rare earths lifting this mining stock.
